emails.subject: URGENT: Ransomware attack on production servers
emails.body: We've detected ransomware encryption on 3 production servers. All customer data is at risk. Need immediate incident response team activation. This is a Code Red emergency.

emails.subject: WIN $10,000 - No purchase necessary!!!
emails.body: You've been randomly selected for our $10,000 sweepstakes. To claim your prize, simply provide your full name, address, SSN, and bank account details. Act now!

emails.subject: Enterprise contract renewal - 1000 licenses
emails.body: Hi, our annual contract expires next month. We'd like to discuss renewal terms for 1000 licenses. Also interested in adding premium support. Can we schedule a call this week?

emails.subject: Cannot access account after password reset
emails.body: I reset my password yesterday but still can't login. Getting 'account locked' error. I need access urgently for an important client presentation tomorrow morning.

emails.subject: April Product Newsletter - New Features Inside
emails.body: Exciting updates this month! We've launched AI-powered analytics, improved dashboard performance by 40%, and added 15 new integrations. Read the full details in our blog post.

emails.subject: Critical bug in payment processing module
emails.body: Found a critical bug where duplicate charges are being processed for recurring subscriptions. Affected customers: ~500. Need immediate fix and refund process initiated.

emails.subject: Verify your account within 24 hours or face suspension
emails.body: Your account will be permanently suspended unless you verify your identity immediately. Click this link and enter your credentials to avoid service interruption.

emails.subject: Request for technical documentation and API specs
emails.body: Hello, we're evaluating your platform for integration with our ERP system. Could you provide comprehensive API documentation, rate limits, and sample code for Python and Java?

emails.subject: URGENT: CEO requests immediate status report
emails.body: The CEO needs a comprehensive status report on the Q1 deliverables by 3 PM today. Please compile all project updates, metrics, and risk assessments ASAP.

emails.subject: You're a FINALIST for our $50,000 grant program!
emails.body: Congratulations! Your application has been shortlisted. To receive your grant, please provide banking details and pay a small processing fee of $99. Limited time offer!

emails.subject: Integration failing with 503 errors
emails.body: Our webhook integration has been failing with 503 errors since this morning. This is blocking our order processing pipeline. Need urgent assistance to restore connectivity.

emails.subject: Partnership proposal: Joint venture opportunity
emails.body: We're a Series B startup in the AI space. We see strong synergy between our products and would like to explore a joint venture or acquisition discussion. Are you available for a confidential call?

emails.subject: Monthly Developer Newsletter - April 2026
emails.body: This month's highlights: New SDK releases, upcoming hackathons, tutorial series on machine learning integration, and community spotlight features. Check it out!

emails.subject: Compliance audit notification - Action required
emails.body: Annual compliance audit scheduled for April 15-20. All departments must submit documentation by April 12. Non-compliance may result in regulatory penalties.

emails.subject: Free cruise vacation - You've been selected!
emails.body: You've won an all-expenses-paid 7-day Caribbean cruise! Simply call this premium number (charges apply) or click here with your credit card info to claim your prize.

emails.subject: Billing error: Charged for services not used
emails.body: I was charged $500 for premium features I never activated. My account shows I'm on the basic plan but billing reflects premium tier. Please investigate and refund.

emails.subject: MASSIVE DATA LEAK - Customer information exposed
emails.body: Critical security incident: Customer PII has been exposed due to misconfigured S3 bucket. Approximately 100,000 records affected. Legal and PR teams must be notified immediately.

emails.subject: Claim your inheritance - $2.5 Million USD
emails.body: Dear friend, I am Barrister John Smith. I have $2.5 Million USD in unclaimed inheritance belonging to you. Send your bank details and a small fee to proceed with transfer.

emails.subject: Urgent: Server capacity at 98% - Scale needed
emails.body: Production servers are at 98% CPU and memory capacity. Traffic spike expected to continue. Need immediate horizontal scaling approved and implemented to prevent outage.

emails.subject: Question about white-label solution pricing
emails.body: Hi, we're a consulting firm interested in your white-label solution for our clients. Can you provide pricing tiers, customization options, and SLA details for reseller partnerships?

emails.subject: Export feature not working for large datasets
emails.body: When trying to export reports with more than 10,000 rows, the system times out after 5 minutes. This is a recurring issue affecting our monthly reporting workflow.

emails.subject: Webinar Invitation: Future of Cloud Computing 2026
emails.body: Join industry experts for our upcoming webinar on cloud computing trends. Topics include serverless architecture, edge computing, and AI-driven optimization. Register now!

emails.subject: Act now: Your warranty is about to expire!
emails.body: URGENT: Your product warranty expires in 3 days. Extend now for just $299/year. Click here immediately or lose all coverage. This is your final notice!

emails.subject: Request for product demo for executive team
emails.body: Hello, our CTO and VP of Engineering would like a comprehensive product demo next week. We're evaluating solutions for our 300-person engineering team. Please share available time slots.
